name: Shower Curtain Rings  Matte Black - Threshold™
description:
Attaching your beautiful new shower curtain to any standard rod will be a breeze with these Shower Curtain Rings from Threshold™. This pack includes 12 matte black shower curtain rings — a perfect option for any decor scheme — that are made from reliable steel. Plus, the snap-lock closure allows you to easily open and close the rings so you can quickly hang your curtain.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
